prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a smug white duck in a black suit and black tie behind a brown podium, six golden triangular sound-wave fragments floating around the head like preaching voice vibrations, thick black outlines, radial burst background in deep green and gold, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只自鸣得意的白色鸭子穿黑色西装配黑色领带站在棕色讲台后，六块金色三角形声波碎片漂浮在头部周围如传教声音震动，粗黑线条，深绿色和金色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a self-important white duck wearing a dark suit with white collar, standing at a brown stepped podium with a superior look, six golden chevron-shaped sound fragments arranged around the head like echoes of a sermon, halftone shading, radial burst background in burgundy and amber, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只自命不凡的白色鸭子穿深色西装配白衬衫领口，站在棕色阶梯讲台旁带着优越感的表情，六块金色人字形声音碎片排列在头部周围如布道回声，半调阴影，酒红色和琥珀色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a haughty white duck in black formal jacket looking down with half-closed eyes, a brown tiered podium below, six golden triangular voice-wave pieces floating in a circle behind the head like radiating sound, bold comic outlines with flat fills, radial burst background in dark teal and warm gold, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只傲慢的白色鸭子黑色正装外套半闭眼俯视，下方棕色分层讲台，六块金色三角形声波块漂浮成头部后方圆形如辐射声音，粗漫画线条平面填充，深青色和温暖金色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a cunning white duck in profile wearing a dark suit with tie, a small podium at chest level, six golden sound-burst fragments floating behind the head like a crown of preaching echoes, warm comic coloring, radial burst background in forest green and orange, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只狡猾的白色鸭子侧面穿深色西装配领带，胸口处小讲台，六块金色声音爆发碎片漂浮在头后如布道回声皇冠，温暖漫画上色，森林绿和橙色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a pompous white duck with smug half-closed eyes in a black suit behind a brown multi-layered podium, six golden triangular sound pieces arranged in a wide arc above the head like visible voice waves, vintage pop art shading, radial burst background in navy and gold, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只自大的白色鸭子半闭得意眼穿黑色西装站在棕色多层讲台后，六块金色三角形声音块排列成头部上方宽弧线如可见声波，复古波普艺术阴影，海军蓝和金色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a scheming white duck with closed smug eyes in a formal black jacket, a brown podium at chest level, six golden voice-vibration fragments in a perfect circle behind the head like a radiant halo of sermon sound, thick comic outlines, radial burst background in emerald green and cream gold, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只诡计多端的白色鸭子闭着得意的眼穿黑色正装外套，胸口处棕色讲台，六块金色声音震动碎片排列成头后完美圆形如布道声音光环，粗漫画线条，翡翠绿和奶油金放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a white duck with one large wide-open eye and one small squinted eye, a thick black line crossing over the large eye like a mask strap, a flame-shaped orange headpiece with gold swirls, colorful blue yellow and red feather plumes behind the head, bold outlines, radial burst background in red and orange, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只白色鸭子一只大睁眼和一只小眯眼，粗黑线横跨大眼如面具带，火焰形橙色头饰配金色漩涡，身后蓝黄红色彩色羽毛，粗线条，红色和橙色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a tricky white duck with asymmetrical eyes — one big round eye with a black stripe across it, one tiny narrowed eye, an elaborate fiery crown headdress in orange and scarlet with gold accents, vivid feather plumes in blue yellow and red rising behind, halftone shading, radial burst background in purple and magenta, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只狡猾的白色鸭子不对称眼睛——一只大圆眼上有黑色条纹横跨，一只小眯眼，精致火焰皇冠头饰橙红色配金色装饰，身后蓝黄红色鲜艳羽毛，半调阴影，紫色和洋红色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a mischievous white duck tilting its head, one oversized eye with a thick black band crossing over it, one small squinting eye, a flame-shaped orange-red headdress with gold decorative swirls, trailing blue yellow and crimson feathers with pointed tips, bold outlines, radial burst background in teal and gold, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只调皮的白色鸭子歪着头，一只超大眼上有粗黑带子横跨，一只小眯眼，火焰形橙红色头饰带金色装饰漩涡，拖曳蓝黄深红色尖锐羽毛，粗线条，青色和金色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a cunning white duck in profile with one large eye and one small eye, a black line crossing the large eye like an eyepatch strap, a fiery orange headdress with golden swirl accents, colorful blue yellow and red feather plumes fanning out behind, vintage comic coloring, radial burst background in green and coral, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只狡猾的白色鸭子侧面一只大眼一只小眼，黑色线横跨大眼如眼罩带，火焰形橙色头饰配金色漩涡装饰，身后展开蓝黄红色彩色羽毛，复古漫画上色，绿色和珊瑚色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a theatrical white duck with mismatched eyes — one huge wide eye with a black strap across it, one tiny squinted eye, a sweeping flame-shaped headdress in orange and pink with gold details, dramatic blue yellow and red feathers extending behind with sharp tips, bold outlines, radial burst background in navy and coral, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只戏剧性的白色鸭子不匹配的眼睛——一只巨大睁眼上有黑色带子横跨，一只小眯眼，流畅火焰形头饰橙粉色配金色细节，身后戏剧性延伸的蓝黄红色尖锐羽毛，粗线条，海军蓝和珊瑚色放射状光柱背景，无边框

prompt: American retro comic style, pop art, above the shoulders, a mysterious white duck facing forward with one large round eye crossed by a thick black line and one small narrowed eye, a majestic flame crown in deep red and orange with gold swirls, sharp feather plumes in blue yellow and red rising behind like a royal crest, thick outlines, radial burst background in royal purple and gold, no border
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画风格，波普艺术，肩部以上，一只神秘的白色鸭子正面朝前一只大圆眼被粗黑线横跨和一只小眯眼，威严深红橙色火焰皇冠配金色漩涡，身后蓝黄红色尖锐羽毛如皇家冠饰，粗线条，皇家紫色和金色放射状光柱背景，无边框
